시편 49:1.content: Hear this, all you peoples. Listen, all you inhabitants of the world,

시편 49:2.content: both low and high, rich and poor together.

시편 49:3.content: My mouth will speak words of wisdom. My heart will utter understanding.

시편 49:4.content: I will incline my ear to a proverb. I will solve my riddle on the harp.

시편 49:5.content: Why should I fear in the days of evil, when iniquity at my heels surrounds me?

시편 49:6.content: Those who trust in their wealth, and boast in the multitude of their riches—

시편 49:7.content: none of them can by any means redeem his brother, nor give God a ransom for him.

시편 49:8.content: For the redemption of their life is costly, no payment is ever enough,

시편 49:9.content: that he should live on forever, that he should not see corruption.

시편 49:10.content: For he sees that wise men die; likewise the fool and the senseless perish, and leave their wealth to others.

시편 49:11.content: Their inward thought is that their houses will endure forever, and their dwelling places to all generations. They name their lands after themselves.

시편 49:12.content: But man, despite his riches, doesn’t endure. He is like the animals that perish.

시편 49:13.content: This is the destiny of those who are foolish, and of those who approve their sayings.

시편 49:14.content: They are appointed as a flock for Sheol. Death shall be their shepherd. The upright shall have dominion over them in the morning. Their beauty shall decay in Sheol, far from their mansion.

시편 49:15.content: But God will redeem my soul from the power of Sheol, for he will receive me.

시편 49:16.content: Don’t be afraid when a man is made rich, when the glory of his house is increased;

시편 49:17.content: for when he dies he will carry nothing away. His glory won’t descend after him.

시편 49:18.content: Though while he lived he blessed his soul— and men praise you when you do well for yourself—

시편 49:19.content: he shall go to the generation of his fathers. They shall never see the light.

시편 49:20.content: A man who has riches without understanding, is like the animals that perish.
